title: Antam Gold Tumbles Rp 25 K as Global Bullion Weakens on Stronger Dollar, Rising US Yields

title: JCI Opens in Red Following Dow’s 1,000-Point Drop and Rising Oil Prices

title: Canada to Ratify Women-Inclusive Indonesian Trade Deal This Year
body: Indonesia reported that its trade with Canada totaled almost $4.4 billion in 2025, with a $970 million deficit on Jakarta’s side.

title: Government Pushes Eid Bonuses for App Drivers Despite Pushback
body: Under ministry guidelines, the bonus must be paid in cash and should equal at least 25% of a driver’s average net income over a year.

title: JCI Rises 1.76% to 7,765 as Asian Markets Rebound
